Name: Leysin American School in Switzerland
Tagline: Leysin American School is a prestigious international Boarding School in Switzerland for grades 7-12. We offer exceptional IB, AP, and ESL programs.
About: Since 1961, Leysin American School in Switzerland has rooted itself in its family-run identity. Founded by a family of educators inspired to bring students together across cultures in the aftermath of World War II, LAS benefits from the strategic oversight and genuine love that the school’s original caretakers have passed along through the decades.
Philosophy: Leysin and LAS share a rich and intertwined history that stretches back decades. What began as a small school in a picturesque alpine village has grown into a vibrant international community that welcomes students and families from around the world.
Outcomes: Leysin American School in Switzerland boasts a strong record of university placements, with graduates attending prestigious institutions worldwide. Students excel in IB and AP exams, reflecting the school's commitment to academic excellence and global citizenship.
Admissions: Once the full application has been received, a final decision will be made by the Admissions Committee within 10 business days. Accepted students will receive the acceptance package electronically and/or via mail.
Quote: Surrounded by Switzerland’s pristine alpine environment and global classroom experiences, LAS encourages students to lead with integrity—developing ethical leadership, environmental stewardship, and responsible citizenship through immersive learning and a values-based mission.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: The best part about LAS is that it feels like home, and over 60 years of LAS alumni will tell you that they found a home and family on our Magic Mountain.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: First, you will notice the incredible view that greets you everywhere on campus. Our campus is in one of the prettiest spots in the Swiss Alps!
Performance.Coaching Credentials: The faculty at Leysin American School in Switzerland includes highly qualified educators, many of whom hold advanced degrees and international teaching certifications. Teachers bring diverse global perspectives, enhancing the American curriculum with their specialized expertise.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Leysin American School prioritizes student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system, including dedicated house parents and access to professional counselors. The nurturing boarding environment fosters emotional resilience and a strong sense of community.
Performance.Academic Integration: Leysin American School offers a rigorous curriculum featuring both the International Baccalaureate (IB) and Advanced Placement (AP) programs. Students benefit from a diverse range of subjects and experiential learning opportunities in a Swiss alpine setting.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at Leysin American School is meticulously tracked through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. The school's commitment to quality is reinforced by its IB accreditation and personalized advisory system.
